title: Neo Elytra Flight HUD
description: An improved fork of the Elytra Flight HUD mod for 1.20.4.
body:
This mod adds a heads-up display to the Elytra.

![In operation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7fc542011193f857e4c4419f7b66216d9955cdf.png)

It is a fork of the [Elytra Flight HUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-flight-hud) mod with the 3D projection corrected and some little features added.

Metric units are now used – speed is shown in km/h and vertical speed in m/s.

The mod is currently incompatible with "do a barrel roll" due to disregarding the camera's roll.
